ques: Locate the GitHub repository for the open-source project "angular" and identify the last three issues closed.
answer: In the angular/angular repository, the last three issues closed are: #69500 "Docs: Improve discoverability of resource({ stream })" (closed ~2h ago), #69534 "@angular/common: Denial of Service (DoS) via OOM in Date Formatting (formatDate)" (closed ~8h ago), and #69530 "NgModule Zone.js Change Detection not working in Angular 22 - UI not updating" (closed ~14h ago).
